Steps.Description: if opponent uses Hydro Pump, switch to Blissey and use Trick. Switch to Chandelure 5x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent uses Scald, switch to Blissey and use Stealth Rock
And opponent switches into Exeggutor, switch to Chandelure then switch to the second Metagross Trick. Switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
And opponent switches into Golduck, switch to Chandelure then switch back to Blissey Trick. Switch to Chandelure again then 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if Exeggutor comes out again, switch to Metagross Trick. Switch to Chandelure once more then 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if Lapras comes out, switch to Poliwrath Belly Drum + X.Speed
if opponent Lapras comes out, switch to Poliwrath Belly Drum + X.Speed
if opponent switches out into Chansey, use Stealth Rock then switch to Chandelure 4x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent switches out into Claydol, use Stealth Rock then switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
